tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file from the local filesystem

tools.name: shell
tools.description: Execute a shell command and return stdout/stderr. Supports optional timeout.
tools.parameters: {"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","description":"Shell command to execute"},"timeout":{"type":"number","description":"Timeout in seconds (default: no timeout)"}},"required":["command"]}

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Create or overwrite a file with the given content
tools.parameters: {"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string","description":"Path to the file to write"},"content":{"type":"string","description":"Content to write to the file"}},"required":["path","content"]}

tools.name: glob
tools.description: Find files matching a glob pattern in the current directory tree

tools.name: grep
tools.description: Search file contents using regular expressions
tools.parameters: {"type":"object","properties":{"pattern":{"type":"string","description":"Regex pattern to search for"},"path":{"type":"string","description":"Directory or file path to search (default: .)"},"include":{"type":"string","description":"File pattern to include (e.g. *.zig)"},"max_results":{"type":"number","description":"Maximum number of results (default 50)"}},"required":["pattern"]}

tools.name: edit
tools.description: Find and replace a specific text string in a file. Use for small, targeted changes.
tools.parameters: {"type":"object","properties":{"file_path":{"type":"string","description":"Path to the file to edit"},"old_string":{"type":"string","description":"Exact text to find and replace"},"new_string":{"type":"string","description":"Replacement text"}},"required":["file_path","old_string","new_string"]}

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List the contents of a directory, showing file names, types, and sizes
tools.parameters: {"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string","description":"Directory path to list (default: current directory)"},"show_hidden":{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether to show hidden files (default: false)"}},"required":[]}

tools.name: create_file
tools.description: Create a new empty file or a file with provided content. Fails if file already exists.
tools.parameters: {"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string","description":"Path for the new file"},"content":{"type":"string","description":"Optional initial content for the file"}},"required":["path"]}

tools.name: move_file
tools.description: Move or rename a file from source to destination

tools.name: copy_file
tools.description: Copy a file from source to destination, creating parent directories if needed

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: Delete a single file. Blocks directories, absolute paths, wildcards, parent traversal, and files over 1MB.
tools.parameters: {"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string","description":"Relative path of the file to delete"}},"required":["path"]}

tools.name: file_info
tools.description: Get metadata about a file: size, modification time, type, and permissions
